revision.comment: expand from {{str rep}} to replace all occurrences, using count=
DePiep moved page [[Template:Str rep all]] to [[Template:Replace]]: More generic name. Was not in use.
Undid revision 546958893 by [[Special:Contributions/Michael Chidester|Michael Chidester]] ([[User talk:Michael Chidester|talk]])
Protected Template:Replace: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: 11,000 transclusions ([Edit=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Replace]]": Allowing template editors on some templates with full protection dating back to pre-[[WP:TPROT|TPROT]] times which aren't too often or too sensitively used. ([Edit=Require template editor access] (in...
Add regex option, plain by default

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Replace]]": used in system messages ([[MediaWiki:Titleblacklist-custom-archive]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Replace]]": 1MM+ uses ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Replace]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
「[[Template:Replace]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限)[移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
Add regex option, plain by default
Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Replace]]": 1MM+ uses ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: Importing [[Template:Months]] and associated templates to attempt to edit and merge into [[Template:Japanese_Lunisolar_Calendar]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
1 revision imported: overwriting this page since it for some reason started to get issues
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
